title: Tuna Tartine
description: A light and refreshing French-inspired open-faced sandwich, perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick rounds.
Place the baguette slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a medium bowl, combine the tuna, crème fraîche, and chopped parsley.
Spread a layer of the tuna mixture onto each toasted baguette slice.
Top with a lettuce leaf and serve immediately.
